ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admission_rates" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "admit_0_4" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 0-4 */,
  "admit_5_12" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 5-12 */,
  "admit_13_17" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 13-17 */,
  "admit_18_24" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 18-24 */,
  "admit_25_34" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 25-34 */,
  "admit_35_44" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 35-44 */,
  "admit_45_54" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 45-54 */,
  "admit_55_64" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 55-64 */,
  "admit_65_74" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 65-74 */,
  "admit_75_" REAL /* Admission rate for age group 75 and above */,
  "admit_all_ages" REAL /* Total admission rate across all age groups */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type */,
  "total_patients" INTEGER /* Total number of patients admitted on the specified date */,
  "average_stay_days" REAL /* Average number of days patients stay in the hospital */,
  "reason_for_admission" TEXT /* Common reasons for admission */,
  "admission_source" TEXT /* Source of the admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rates_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("admission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_rates_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_statistics" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of visit */,
  "visit_0_4" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 0-4 */,
  "visit_5_12" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 5-12 */,
  "visit_13_17" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 13-17 */,
  "visit_18_24" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 18-24 */,
  "visit_25_34" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 25-34 */,
  "visit_35_44" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 35-44 */,
  "visit_45_54" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 45-54 */,
  "visit_55_64" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 55-64 */,
  "visit_65_74" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 65-74 */,
  "visit_75_" REAL /* Visit rate for age group 75 and above */,
  "visit_all_ages" REAL /* Total visit rate across all age groups */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "visit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit type */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits on the specified date */,
  "average_visit_duration" REAL /* Average duration of visits */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Common reasons for visits */,
  "visit_source" TEXT /* Source of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_statistics_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_statistics_visit_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_type_id") REFERENCES visit_types ("visit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital */,
  "bed_count" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* List of specialties offered by the hospital */,
  "emergency_services" INTEGER /* Whether the hospital offers emergency services */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the hospital based on patient feedback */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_types" (
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type */,
  "admission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission type */,
  "is_emergency" INTEGER /* Whether the admission type is an emergency */,
  "average_stay" REAL /* Average stay for this type of admission */,
  "common_reasons" TEXT /* Common reasons for this type of admission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_types" (
  "visit_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit type */,
  "visit_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visit type */,
  "is_inpatient" INTEGER /* Whether the visit type is inpatient */,
  "average_duration" REAL /* Average duration for this type of visit */,
  "common_reasons" TEXT /* Common reasons for this type of visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
